message:
fix(doctor): Recognize apiKey from config in runSelfTest()

The runSelfTest() function was only checking environment variables via
getAvailableProviders(), ignoring the apiKey field in config.json. This
was inconsistent with computeDoctorChecks() which properly checked both.

Now runSelfTest() checks both environment variables AND config.apiKey,
matching the behavior of computeDoctorChecks(). Also adds keySource field
to details to indicate where the API key was found ("config", "env", or "none").

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
